content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the right ahead with the dashed center line showing a clear right-hand bend, and the car appears well-positioned near the center of the track.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 20 + 5 = 25
Waypoint 25: (6.774889, 0.841267)
Car position: (6.051649, 0.652639)
Bearing = atan2(0.841267 - 0.652639, 6.774889 - 6.051649) = atan2(0.188628, 0.723240) = atan2(0.2609) ≈ 14.6°
Current heading: -0.641°
Delta = 14.6 - (-0.641) = 15.24° → moderate left needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves right ahead as shown in image; delta to waypoint 25 is +15.24° (left), so I apply 15° left steering to follow the waypoint line into the right curve.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683",
    "Large right-hand curve begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases significantly)",
    "Car is nearly centered on the straight, delta increases as curve approaches",
    "Use steering_angle=10 for delta 12-18°, steering_angle=15 for delta 15-20° entering curve",
    "After the right curve, track loops back left and returns — full circuit",
    "Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves",
    "Waypoints 0-23 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683",
    "Right curve starts gently at wp24 (y increases), sharpens at wp27-30",
    "Car heading stays near -0.6° on the straight — minimal correction needed on straight",
    "Delta ~15° at wp25 confirms entering the right curve — need moderate left steering"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.7336, 5.8525, 5.9498, 6.0516],
    "y": [0.6541, 0.6516, 0.6512, 0.6526],
    "yaw": [-1.165, -1.263, -1.060, -0.641]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": 15.24,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 15.0
}
```
